chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-714 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.2961/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2962/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.11.2025 Mr. Raja Ram Chander, advocate for petitioners. == 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not wish to press the instant petition as the petitioners intend to approach the appropriate forum available to them under the Civil Law and the Revenue hierarchy. In view of the submission made by the learned counsel, the petition in hand stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
